title: Plato Sensor Specification
description: Detailed schema for a single sensor definition within a room configuration.

type.description: Data type of the sensor reading.

unit.description: Physical unit of measurement. Use null for dimensionless or boolean sensors.

source.description:
Data source URI in format 'protocol:path'.

Supported protocols:
- mqtt: MQTT topic path
- gpio: GPIO pin number
- pwm: PWM channel
- adc: ADC channel
- i2c: I2C device address
- spi: SPI device
- modbus: Modbus register
- bacnet: BACnet object
- snmp: SNMP OID
- ipmi: IPMI sensor
- zigbee: Zigbee device
- game: Game engine entity/state

range.description: Valid operating range as [min, max]. null for unbounded sensors (e.g., boolean).

alarm_range.description: Range that indicates an alarming condition as [min, max]. The alarm triggers when the sensor value falls within this range. null if no alarm threshold for this sensor (alarm conditions are defined separately in the alarms array).
